title: Personalized 3D App Icon Grid AI
sourceTitle: Personalized 3D App Icon Grid AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Personalized 12-square premium 3D app icon grid built around cute 3D creator boy with black hair, big eyes, tiny wooden carousel-horse hair accessory and WeChat, Alipay, Taobao, Douyin, JD.com, Baidu, Meituan, Didi, NetEase Cloud Music, Tencent Video, Xiaohongshu, Zhihu. Subject: cute 3D creator boy with black hair, big eyes, tiny wooden carousel-horse hair accessory is integrated into each icon as a cute personalized mascot, while chat, payment, shopping, short video, delivery, search, food service, ride, music, streaming, lifestyle notes, Q&A guide the distinct app functions and scenes across all twelve icons. Scene: Clean white studio background with twelve floating square 3D icons arranged in a precise grid, each glossy, realistic, high-end, and unified in lighting, depth, shadow, reflection, and texture. Composition: Fixed 12-icon grid layout: three or four tidy rows of square 3D app icons, consistent rounded-square icon scale, each icon visually unique but sharing the same premium 3D studio style and personalized mascot logic. Signature Elements: cute 3D creator boy with black hair, big eyes, tiny wooden carousel-horse hair accessory, WeChat, Alipay, Taobao, Douyin, JD.com, Baidu, Meituan, Didi, NetEase Cloud Music, Tencent Video, Xiaohongshu, Zhihu, chat, payment, shopping, short video, delivery, search, food service, ride, music, streaming, lifestyle notes, Q&A, twelve square 3D icons, floating white studio grid, personalized mascot poses, recognizable app-function props, glossy depth, and premium unified icon-system finish. Style: Hyper-realistic premium digital art, modern glossy 3D app icon design, elegant studio lighting, realistic materials, high-end product icon set, depth of field, and 8K visual quality. Color Palette: Clean white studio base, each app uses its recognizable brand or function color system from WeChat, Alipay, Taobao, Douyin, JD.com, Baidu, Meituan, Didi, NetEase Cloud Music, Tencent Video, Xiaohongshu, Zhihu, balanced by soft gray shadows, glossy highlights, and coherent 3D mascot color treatment. Lighting: Soft studio lighting with gentle reflections, floating icon shadows, glassy highlights, and consistent illumination across all twelve icons. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Glossy plastic, glass, soft fabric mascot clothing, mini props, logo-like shapes, realistic reflections, and polished icon surfaces. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
